title: Embed Onenote in Monday Dashboard

posts.author: Kelly2E (Kelly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

Our team uses MS Onenote to take notes during team meetings. I’d now like to integrate these notes in our team’s Monday dashboard.

I tried to add it with the “Embed everything” widget using the shared Onenote link, but it doesn’t seem to work. Is there any way I can embed this?

I don’t want to create a separate board or group for meeting notes tbh.

Thanks!
